en: The teacher is here.

ab: naRin ti mawRat, qalazuk ka madded ta qaddedan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: saqalima lipay setangi, hibang temawaR, qasulun lusit saqsaqay temawaR!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: kuwaya! qatiw pa ita sa iRuR.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: saqatulu lipay temawaR, temawaR qemadanan qatiw pa ita qawRat tu mali!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: temawaR nani melipay, qasulun pa iku tu tina matiw sa kiyukay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: ngid iku uti, qatiw pa iku sa siatisinan.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: patudan, taRaw bedes ku, qatiw sa siatisinan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: qanengi iku matiw banaw tu lima ni?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: qangid ti hibang temaqsi, antangi qawka matiw.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: patudan, taRaw uRu ku, ngid hibang qemadanan.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: patudan muman saqaussiq lipay hibang pa iku, ngid iku paqayta tu ising.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Abas?

ab: taRaw bedes na, yau ta siatisinan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is utay?

ab: patudan, taRaw qeluqung ni utay, hibang setangi.
en: Teacher, utay has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Abas come?
She has a fever.
